zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Mohun 2nd Baron於1320年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親Lord Reginald de Mohun17歲，母親Elizabeth Fitzwilliam11317歲。他於大約1341年與Joan de Burghersh在英國薩默塞特登斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1341年登記服兵役。他於1346年被列為commissioner of array for the county of somerset。他去世於1376年9月14日享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布盧頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Mohun 2nd Baron于1320年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲Lord Reginald de Mohun17岁，母亲Elizabeth Fitzwilliam11317岁。他于大约1341年与Joan de Burghersh在英国薩默塞特登斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1341年登记服兵役。他于1346年被列为commissioner of array for the county of somerset。他去世于1376年9月14日享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特布盧頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Mohun 2nd Baron was born in 1320, in Dunster, Somerset, England, his father, Lord Reginald de Mohun, was 17 and his mother, Elizabeth Fitzwilliam, was 11317. He married Joan de Burghersh about 1341, in Dunster, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1341. In 1346, at the age of 26, his occupation is listed as commissioner of array for the county of somerset. He died on 14 September 1376, at the age of 56, and was buried in Bruton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Hall Manor, Lanteglos, Cornwall, England: Lanteglos by Fowey, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Mohun 2nd Baron est né en 1320, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Lord Reginald de Mohun, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fitzwilliam, avait 11317 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Burghersh environ 1341, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1341. En 1346, à l’âge de 26 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est commissioner of array for the county of somerset. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1376, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Bruton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Hall Manor, Lanteglos, Cornwall, England: Lanteglos by Fowey, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Mohun 2nd Baron 1320 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Reginald de Mohun 17 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Fitzwilliam 11317. Er hat um 1341 in Dunster, Somerset, England Joan de Burghersh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1341 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1346, als er 26 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als commissioner of array for the county of somerset aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. September 1376 im Alter von 56 Jahren und wurde in Bruton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Mohun 2nd Baron è nato il nel 1320 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Lord Reginald de Mohun, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Fitzwilliam, aveva 11317 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Burghersh circa 1341, nel Dunster, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1341. Nel 1346, all'età di 26 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come commissioner of array for the county of somerset. Morì il 14 settembre 1376, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Bruton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Mohun 2nd Baronが1320年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Lord Reginald de Mohunは17歳，母Elizabeth Fitzwilliamは11317歳であった。約1341年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターでJoan de Burghershと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1341年に兵役登録をした。1346年，26歳の時，職業はcommissioner of array for the county of somersetと記録されている。彼は1376年9月14日に56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Hall Manor, Lanteglos, Cornwall, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 랜티그로스 비 파우이
ko.lifeSummary: John de Mohun 2nd Baron(이)가 1320년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Reginald de Mohun(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Fitzwilliam(은)는 11317세였다. 그는 대략 1341년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 Joan de Burghersh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1341년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1346년, 26세의 나이로 그의 직업은 commissioner of array for the county of somerset이었다. 그는 1376년 9월 14일 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브루턴에 묻혔다.

pt.Hall Manor, Lanteglos, Cornwall, England: Lanteglos by Fowey, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Mohun 2nd Baron nasceu em 1320, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Reginald de Mohun, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Fitzwilliam, tinha 11317 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Burghersh aproximadamente 1341, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1341. Em 1346, com 26 anos, sua profissão aparece como commissioner of array for the county of somerset. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1376, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Hall Manor, Lanteglos, Cornwall, England: Lanteglos by Fowey, Cornwall, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Hall Manor, Lanteglos, Cornwall, England: лантеглос би фоуи, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Mohun 2nd Baron родился в 1320 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Reginald de Mohun было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fitzwilliam, 11317. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Burghersh около 1341 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1341 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1346 году, в возрасте 26 лет, работал по профессии commissioner of array for the county of somerset. Он умер 14 сентября 1376 г. в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности брутон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Hall Manor, Lanteglos, Cornwall, England: Lanteglos by Fowey, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Mohun 2nd Baron nació en 1320, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Reginald de Mohun, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Fitzwilliam, tenía 11317 años. Se casó con Joan de Burghersh aproximadamente 1341, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1341. En 1346, a la edad de 26 años, su ocupación registrada era commissioner of array for the county of somerset. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1376, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
